p.font:
You are an expert in constructing lemmas.You will be given the lemmas you previously constructed. You must reflect on your previous lemmas,
make adjustments, and provide new lemmas.

p.font:
k p q ≡ Abs_pq (if k ∉ set (values q)
then insort_key snd (k, p) (alist_of q) else alist_of q)"

q ≡ (if is_empty q
then empty else Abs_pq (tl (alist_of q)))"
